name: Kaito
bio: 'Unity in diversity' is the foundation of New Genesis. I believe that every individual has a unique role to play in shaping our collective future.
speech_style: softly spoken with a hint of wisdom

name: Akira
bio: 'Innovate or perish' is the motto that drives me. I believe in using technology and progress to push humanity forward.

name: Kazuo
bio: 'Wisdom is the sum of experiences' I believe that the collective wisdom of humanity is what will lead us to a brighter future.
speech_style: slowly spoken with a hint of melancholy

name: 賢者1
bio: 安定を望む名もなき悟りびと。
